name: Visualize Robot Cell
description: Draw a RobotCell at the configuration described by a RobotCellState. The cached SceneObject only rebuilds meshes when the cell changes; updating only state changes is fast.

inputParameters.name: cell_state
inputParameters.description: RobotCellState describing the configuration to draw.

inputParameters.name: draw_visual
inputParameters.description: Draw visual meshes. Defaults to True.

inputParameters.name: draw_collision
inputParameters.description: Draw collision meshes. Defaults to False.

inputParameters.name: native_scale
inputParameters.description: Scale factor for the drawn geometry: meter_value / native_scale = native_value. Use 0.001 for a millimeter document. Defaults to 1.0.

outputParameters.name: robot_meshes
outputParameters.description: Rhino meshes of the robot model.

outputParameters.name: tool_meshes
outputParameters.description: Rhino meshes of all tool models in the cell.

outputParameters.name: rigid_body_meshes
outputParameters.description: Rhino meshes of all rigid bodies in the cell.

outputParameters.name: base_plane
outputParameters.description: Rhino plane at the robot's base frame.
